mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_dept ORDER BY sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_dept (dept_name, parent_id, sort_order, status) VALUES (#{deptName}, #{parentId}, #{sortOrder}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dept SET dept_name=#{deptName}, parent_id=#{parentId}, sort_order=#{sortOrder}, status=#{status} WHERE dept_id=#{deptId}
